hotelImages.caption: Deluxe Twin Room Type A - Bedroom
Deluxe Twin Room Type A - Bedroom

address.address1: Jl. Teuku Nyak Arief No.17, Lamgugob, Kec. Syiah Kuala
address.address2: No. 17-24, Jl. Teuku Nyak Arief, Banda Aceh

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
dirty and stained sheets  
no towels  
murky water  
dirty floor  
TV not working  
leaking  
there is a dead spider on the bed  
AC not cold  
not recommended, do not choose this hotel, you will regret it later
comments.originalComment:
seprei jorok dan bernoda
tidak dapat handuk
air keruh
lantai jorok
tv tidak nyala
bocor 
terdapat laba-laba mati di tempat tidur
AC tidak dingin
not recommended, jangan pilih hotel ini, akan menyesal nanti

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: After checking in, they asked for additional fees, even though the price issue should be between the hotel and the app. If it doesn't match the price given by the app, it shouldn't be charged to the app. The room was not well-maintained, the ceiling had a lot of mold, the TV was broken, and the AC was very noisy. I hope it can be fixed.
comments.originalComment: Pas udah check in dimintain tambahan biaya lagi, pdhal kan klo soal harga itu urusan pihak hotel sama apk, kalo gak masuk sama harga yg diberikan apk seharusnya gak usah dimaksukin ke apk. Kamar sudah tidak terawat, plavon banyak jamur, tv rusak, ac pun brisik sekali. Semoga diperbaiki lagi yaa

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Bathroom supplies are lacking, such as soap, toothpaste, and toothbrushes.
comments.originalComment: Perlengkapan kamar mandi kurang seperti sabun odol dan sikat gigi
